spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3+), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Add @NonNull annotations to generic type parameters to satisfy stricter null-safety requirements in Spring Boot 4 / JDK 21.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.0.0-M1 (and associated Spring Data versions) enforces stricter null-safety checks on repository interfaces; omitting @NonNull on generic types may cause compilation errors or runtime validation failures due to missing nullability metadata.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.before: public interface StudentDataRestRepository extends PagingAndSortingRepository<Student, Long>{
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.after: public interface StudentDataRestRepository extends PagingAndSortingRepository<@NonNull Student, @NonNull Long> {

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.general_idea: Import the @NonNull annotation from org.jspecify to support the null-safety annotations added to the interface.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/m.why_exists: The code references @NonNull in the generic type parameters, so the import is required for compilation.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 import with JUnit 5 import for the @Test annotation.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; using it causes a compile error if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed or if the project enforces JUnit 5 imports.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @RunWith annotation with JUnit 5 @ExtendWith annotation.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.why_exists: @RunWith is a JUnit 4 specific annotation and is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, leading to test execution failures or compile errors if JUnit 4 is excluded.

spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 SpringRunner import with JUnit 5 SpringExtension import.
spring-boot-2-jpa-spring-data-rest/src/t.why_exists: SpringRunner is part of the JUnit 4 integration; SpringExtension is required for JUnit 5 integration. Using the wrong class causes compile errors.

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Add @NonNull annotations to generic type parameters of JpaRepository to satisfy stricter null-safety checks in Spring Boot 4 / JDK 21.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.0.0-M1 (and associated Spring Data versions) enforces stricter null-safety on repository interfaces; omitting @NonNull on generic type parameters may cause compilation errors or runtime warnings regarding nullable types in the generated repository implementation.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.before: public interface StudentRepository extends JpaRepository<Student, Long>{
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.after: public interface StudentRepository extends JpaRepository<@NonNull Student, @NonNull Long> {

spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.general_idea: Import the @NonNull annotation from org.jspecify to support the null-safety annotations added to the repository interface.
spring-boot-2-jpa-with-hibernate-and-h2/.why_exists: The @NonNull annotation used in the interface definition is not available without this import, leading to a compilation error.
